name: Tollhouse Cookies- Mom Salinger
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Blend together the butter, sugar, and egg until creamy. Gradually add the flour, baking soda, and salt, mixing well after each addition. Stir in a few drops of hot water and mix thoroughly. If desired, fold in the chopped walnuts and vanilla extract. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto greased baking sheets. Bake for 10-12 minutes until golden brown. These cookies are crunchy with a crumbly texture.
